The article highlights Elon Musk's measured approach to this high-stakes launch and acknowledges skepticism while noting the potential for significant growth if the service scales successfully.

title: How Tech and Circularity are Reshaping the Future of Fashion
summary: eBay highlights how technology like Digital Product Passports (DPPs) and circular innovations are transforming the fashion industry towards a more sustainable and economically vibrant future. DPPs are expected to launch in the EU in 2026, boosting resale value and authenticity, while eBay's Circular Fashion Fund supports startups like Refiberd, which uses AI for textile identification. These advancements aim to enhance transparency, traceability, and the overall circularity of fashion products.

title: Komdigi Putus Akses Tiga PSE, Termasuk eBay inc - Gemapos.id
summary: The Indonesian Ministry of Communication and Digital (Komdigi) has blocked access to three private Electronic System Providers (PSEs), including eBay Inc., PT. Dunia Luxindo (bathandbodyworks), and KLM Royal Dutch Airlines, for failing to register. This action is an administrative sanction intended to ensure compliance with regulations, create a more orderly digital space, and protect users from unregistered services. Komdigi had previously issued notifications and warnings, urging all PSEs to register their electronic systems through the OSS system.

title: Starbucks calls corporate employees back to the office — or take a payout
summary: Starbucks is mandating that corporate employees return to the office four days a week starting in October, a move up from the previous three-day requirement. For those unwilling to comply, the company is offering a "one-time voluntary exit program with a cash payment." This new policy, alongside requirements for "people leaders" to relocate to Seattle or Toronto, is part of Starbucks' broader turnaround strategy under CEO Brian Niccol.

title: Valley 200 2025: Therese Tucker
summary: This article profiles Therese Tucker, co-chief executive of BlackLine Inc., highlighting her entrepreneurial journey from cashing out retirement savings to co-founding the company in 2001. It details her leadership in transitioning BlackLine to the cloud and taking it public, and her return as co-chief executive in 2023. Prior to BlackLine, Tucker served as CTO at SunGuard.

title: Macy’s Prices US$500 Million in Senior Notes Ahead of Planned Debt Redemption
summary: Macy's, Inc. has announced the pricing of a private offering of US$500 million in 7.375% senior notes due August 1, 2033, by its subsidiary, Macy’s Retail Holdings, LLC. This offering, expected to close on July 29, 2025, is a strategic move to refinance and restructure the company's debt. The goal is to enhance capital structure efficiency and maintain financial flexibility amid the current retail challenges.

title: eBay Inc.'s (NASDAQ:EBAY) Share Price Could Signal Some Risk
summary: eBay's current P/E ratio of 18.6x is similar to the median U.S. market, which might seem unremarkable. However, the company's earnings have recently declined by 16%, contrasting with positive growth experienced by most other companies. Analysts forecast a modest 4.6% annual growth for eBay over the next three years, significantly lower than the projected 11% market expansion, suggesting its share price might be overvalued given its growth prospects.

title: eBay Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2025 Results
summary: eBay Inc. has reported strong second-quarter 2025 results, with revenue reaching $2.7 billion and Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) at $19.5 billion, both showing 6% growth on an as-reported basis. The company also announced several business highlights including the launch of eBay Live in the U.K., an AI shopping agent, and expanded its Authenticity Guarantee program. eBay returned $759 million to stockholders through share repurchases and cash dividends.

title: EBay Projects Sales That Top Estimates on Consumer Resilience
summary: EBay Inc. shares rose after the company forecast sales exceeding analysts' estimates for the quarter ending September, signaling continued consumer resilience amidst evolving US tariff proposals. The company expects revenue between $2.69 billion and $2.74 billion, with adjusted earnings per share of $1.29 to $1.34, outpacing average analyst predictions for sales. This positive outlook suggests robust consumer spending is driving optimistic projections for the e-commerce giant.

title: AI for investors
summary: eBay reported strong Q2 2025 earnings, significantly beating Wall Street expectations with net income up 64.3% and revenue rising 6.1%. The company saw an increase in active buyers to 134 million and returned $759 million to stockholders, indicating robust financial performance and strategic execution despite a competitive e-commerce market. Analysts view eBay's growth path as steady, attracting risk-averse investors seeking stability.

title: CMRC - Commerce.com Inc Stock Price and Quote
summary: This page provides a comprehensive overview of Commerce.com Inc (CMRC) stock, including its latest price, key financial metrics, performance indicators, and recent analyst ratings. It also features a news feed detailing recent company announcements and activities, alongside insider trading information highlighting proposed sales and purchases by officers and directors.

title: eBay Unveils New Checkout Solution For Vehicle Transactions
summary: eBay has launched "Secure Purchase," a new checkout solution designed to simplify online vehicle transactions. This service streamlines payment, financing, registration, ownership transfer, and transport, aiming to make buying and selling cars, trucks, and motorcycles more convenient and secure. The platform addresses concerns about complexity, especially for cross-state transactions, by verifying identities, automating paperwork, and digitizing fund transfers.

title: Kamini Rangappan Lane
summary: Kamini Rangappan Lane is the President and CEO of Coldwell Banker Realty, one of the nation's largest real estate brokerages with approximately 52,400 affiliated agents across 55+ markets in the U.S. She previously held leadership roles at Sotheby’s International Realty and Compass, Inc., overseeing significant operations and contributing to strategic growth. Lane brings over two decades of experience in marketing, communications, and operations, having also worked at Interbrand, Rapp, eBay.com, and Tradesy, and holds an MBA from Harvard Business School.

title: Must Read: Caleres Acquires Stuart Weitzman, Youthforia Is Shutting Down
summary: Footwear firm Caleres has acquired Stuart Weitzman from Tapestry Inc. for $108.7 million, while indie beauty brand Youthforia is ceasing operations due to a significant sales drop following a foundation shade range controversy. Additionally, American Eagle is defending its Sydney Sweeney campaign against "tone deaf" accusations, stating the ad is "and always was about the jeans." Other news includes Anthropologie's Maeve becoming a standalone brand, Vivienne Westwood denying artist copyright infringement, Business of Fashion launching an AI tool, and tariffs impacting customer service jobs by increasing AI chatbot usage.

title: KWEB Gathered $1 Billion in AUM in July
summary: The KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (KWEB) saw over $1 billion in net inflows in July, driven by declining U.S.-China trade risk and supportive Chinese policies. KWEB, which tracks major Chinese internet companies, has consistently outperformed U.S. technology sectors and has been strategically converting its share classes to Hong Kong listings to reduce investor risk. The fund offers diversification opportunities for tech investors interested in China's rapidly developing internet and AI sectors.

title: eBay Launches Seller Tools to Save Time, Boost Profits, and Build Trust
summary: eBay introduced a new suite of seller tools at its OPEN25 event, focusing on AI-assisted features to save time, boost profitability, and build trust. These innovations include AI Assistant for messaging, Offers in Messaging, a "Your cost" field for tracking inventory, and an Inventory Mapping API. Additionally, new protections for Item Not Received claims and automated positive feedback for successful transactions aim to enhance seller support and marketplace integrity.

title: eBay Announces Integration Of Open Banking Into Its Seller Capital Program
summary: eBay is integrating Open Banking into its Seller Capital program, aiming to simplify and increase access to financing for its sellers. This integration is currently available for eligible sellers in the UK and Germany and is scheduled to roll out to eligible U.S. sellers in the fall of 2025.

title: eBay Seller Capital Integrates Open Banking to Make Financing Easier and More Accessible for Sellers
summary: eBay has integrated Open Banking into its Seller Capital program to provide sellers with easier and more accessible financing options. This initiative allows sellers to securely share their financial data from outside eBay with lending partners, leading to faster, more accurate, and inclusive lending decisions. The integration aims to expand access to capital for a broader range of sellers, including those with strong off-platform sales, by allowing a holistic view of their business operations.

title: eBay Returns to Fashion Month with Pre-loved Runway Shows and an Open Invitation to Designers Worldwide
summary: eBay is bringing its "Endless Runway" initiative back to Fashion Month, partnering with renowned designers like ERDEM and Altuzarra to feature pre-loved items in their Spring/Summer 2026 collections. This effort reinforces circularity in high fashion and highlights the growing consumer interest in resale. eBay will also host its own shoppable pre-loved runway shows during New York and London Fashion Weeks.

title: EBay builds out suite of tech tools for sellers
summary: EBay has introduced a new suite of AI-powered features for sellers, including tools to simplify cost tracking, respond to buyer messages, and automate positive feedback. The e-commerce giant also released an Inventory Mapping API for select U.S. merchants and an item not received (INR) protection feature. These initiatives coincide with eBay's reported 6% increase in revenue and gross merchandise volume in its second-quarter earnings.

title: eBay Launches Free Returns for Vehicle Parts & Accessories
summary: eBay has announced a new free returns policy for qualifying vehicle parts and accessories, allowing buyers to return items for any reason at no cost. This initiative, building on eBay Guaranteed Fit, aims to remove guesswork and uncertainty from online parts shopping by offering flexible 30-day returns, convenient shipping with free labels, and fast refunds. The program is designed to boost buyer confidence for both DIYers and mechanics.

title: eBay Watchlist Trend Report is Back for Fall, Curated by Resident Stylist Brie Welch
summary: eBay has released its fall edition of the eBay Watchlist, a trend report curated by Resident Stylist Brie Welch, highlighting in-demand fashion styles backed by shopper data. The report leverages insights from eBay's vast user base and listings to identify key trends, offering guidance on shopping for pre-loved fashion. Featured trends include luxurious textures, bold shapes, and unique prints, with top luxury brands like Louis Vuitton, Chanel, and Dior seeing increased demand.

title: eBay WARN Act Investigation
summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating eBay, Inc. following a potential mass layoff in Syracuse, New York. The law firm suspects eBay may have violated the WARN Act by failing to provide employees with the required 60-day notice before laying off 215 employees. If a violation is confirmed, affected eBay employees could be entitled to 60 days of severance pay and benefits.

title: Yelp Appoints Logan Green to its Board of Directors
summary: Yelp Inc. has appointed Logan Green, co-founder and former chairman and CEO of Lyft, to its Board of Directors, effective August 19. Green's extensive experience in building and growing consumer brands is expected to support Yelp's focus on product innovation and enhancing user experience. He will contribute to Yelp's continued growth and long-term success by leveraging his expertise in consumer technology and mobility.

title: With the eBay Ambassador Program, Everyone Can Be an Affiliate
summary: eBay has launched its Ambassador Program, opening its affiliate marketing opportunities to all U.S. users. This initiative allows buyers, sellers, and creators to earn commission by sharing eBay listings, building upon the previous eBay Partner Network. The program offers tools for curating collections and promoting sustainable shopping choices with no minimum follower requirements.

title: Billionaire Blackrock CEO Larry Fink Says We Spend 'Tremendous Energy' Extending Life, But Little On How To Pay For Those Extra 20 Years
summary: Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock, argues that the current retirement system, anchored by the age of 65, is outdated given modern life expectancies. He highlights a critical disconnect: while significant effort is invested in extending human life, insufficient attention is given to how individuals will financially support these extra decades. Fink stresses the need for a national conversation and coordinated effort to modernize retirement planning, drawing parallels to the urgency of past crises.

title: If You Invested $10K In Prologis Stock 10 Years Ago, How Much Would You Have Now?
summary: This article examines the hypothetical return on a $10,000 investment in Prologis Inc. (PLD) stock made ten years ago. It calculates that such an investment would now be worth $36,760, including stock appreciation and dividends, representing a 267.60% total return. The article also touches on Prologis's recent earnings, future outlook, and analyst ratings.

title: If You Invested $10K In Equinix Stock 10 Years Ago, How Much Would You Have Now?
summary: If an investor had put $10,000 into Equinix stock a decade ago, their investment would now be worth $34,316, accounting for both stock appreciation and dividends, representing a 243.16% return. This return, however, is lower than the S&P 500's total return of 288.70% over the same period. Analysts currently have a "Buy" rating on Equinix, projecting an 18% upside with a price target of $931.73, and the company has consistently increased its dividend for the past ten years.

title: eBay Opens the ’95 Shop, Celebrating 30 Years of Cultural Icons
summary: eBay has launched "The '95 Shop," a retail experience and online destination celebrating its 30-year legacy by featuring iconic fashion, collectibles, and motors from the 1990s. Curated by actress Sarah Michelle Gellar, the shop highlights cultural staples from the decade, such as Jordan XI sneakers, Pokémon cards, and vintage Gucci. Shoppers can visit the pop-up in New York City or browse online, with proceeds from a seven-day online auction benefiting Make-A-Wish.

title: eBay Celebrates 30 Years of Creating Economic Opportunity for All as it Reinvents the Future of Ecommerce
summary: eBay is celebrating 30 years of ecommerce success, empowering entrepreneurs and shaping the circular economy since 1995. The company is marking this milestone with special events in New York City, including a Nasdaq bell-ringing ceremony and an immersive '95 Shop. eBay continues to leverage AI and innovation to enhance discovery, trust, and engagement, aiming to build a stronger marketplace for the future.

title: eBay Launches Authenticity Guarantee for Apparel
summary: eBay is expanding its Authenticity Guarantee service to include apparel in the UK, aiming to build trust in the pre-loved fashion market. This service ensures that eligible items are meticulously verified by expert authenticators, covering a full range of fashion from clothing and shoes to accessories. The initiative reflects a growing consumer demand for authenticated pre-loved designer fashion and encourages circular fashion practices.

title: eBay launches 2025 Van Conversion of the Year Awards
summary: eBay has announced the return of its Van Conversion of the Year Awards for 2025, seeking the most remarkable and innovative DIY van transformations in the UK. The competition, now in its third year, offers a £10,000 cash prize to the overall winner and £250 in eBay coupons for individual category winners. TV presenter and architect George Clarke will return as head judge, with entries closing on October 26th.

title: Vivek Ramaswamy-Backed Strive, Asset Entities Get Shareholder Approval To Merge, Launch $1.5 Billion Public Bitcoin Treasury Company
summary: Asset Entities Inc. shareholders have approved a reverse merger with Vivek Ramaswamy-backed Strive Enterprises, leading to the creation of a public Bitcoin treasury company. The combined entity, which will operate under the Strive name and ASST ticker on Nasdaq, is expected to secure $1.5 billion in funding, including a $750 million private placement. This strategic move aims to create a significant player in the cryptocurrency treasury space, leveraging Bitcoin through beta and alpha-generating strategies.

title: How Much Would It Take To Earn $100 A Month From Federal Realty Stock
summary: This article details how much investment is needed in Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) stock to generate $100 per month in dividends. It highlights the company's Q2 2025 earnings, future expectations, and explains the dividend yield calculation for income-focused investors. The stock's current dividend yield is 4.44%, requiring an investment of approximately $27,027 (265 shares) to achieve the $100 monthly income goal.

title: eBay Inc. (EBAY) Stock Price Prediction: 2025, 2026, 2030: Analyst Targets & Forecast
summary: This article provides an in-depth stock price prediction for eBay Inc. (EBAY) for 2025, 2026, and 2030, based on analyst targets and forecasts. It highlights eBay's current market standing, recent financial performance, and key strategies, while also discussing bullish and bearish cases, competitive landscape, and investment considerations. The analysts' consensus suggests a Hold rating with a projected downside, emphasizing the challenges and opportunities for the e-commerce giant.

title: eBay Foundation Backs Community-Led Entrepreneurship with $3M in Grants
summary: The eBay Foundation announced its 2025 Global Give grantees, distributing nearly $3 million to over 30 nonprofits globally. This initiative supports community-led entrepreneurship by empowering organizations that expand access to business ownership, especially for historically excluded populations. Featured grantees include Access to Success, Udyogini, and The Acceleration Project, all working to remove barriers and foster economic growth and empowerment.

title: $300M Tech IPO: AI-Powered Ecommerce Platform Pattern Launches Major Nasdaq Public Offering at $14/Share
summary: Pattern Group Inc., an AI-powered e-commerce acceleration platform, has priced its initial public offering at $14.00 per share, aiming to raise $300 million. The company will offer 10,714,286 shares, with an additional 10,714,286 shares sold by existing stockholders, and expects to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market under the ticker "PTRN" on September 19, 2025. Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC and J.P. Morgan are leading the offering.

title: EBay Inc. entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Tise AS from Rubylight Limited and others.
summary: eBay Inc. has signed a definitive agreement to acquire an unknown majority stake in Tise AS from Rubylight Limited and other sellers. The transaction is subject to customary conditions and is anticipated to close by the end of the fourth quarter of 2025. Cobalt Legal advised Rubylight Limited, while Advokatfirmaet Thommessen AS advised eBay Inc.

title: eBay to acquire social marketplace platform Tise
summary: eBay announced its acquisition of Tise, a social marketplace for secondhand fashion and interior design. This strategic move aims to attract Gen Z and millennial customers, modernize eBay's platform, and expand its social commerce capabilities. The acquisition is expected to enhance eBay's consumer-to-consumer experience with Tise's community features and on-trend inventory.

title: Investor Day 2022
summary: This article provides a recap of eBay's 2022 Investor Day, focusing on their strategic initiatives to connect enthusiasts, build communities, and create economic opportunity. It highlights key presentations from executives, outlines financial targets for GMV, revenue, EPS, and advertising revenue, and details sustainability goals. The article also includes important disclosures regarding non-GAAP measures and forward-looking statements.

title: eBay Launches New Global Brand Campaign: “eBay Stories”
summary: eBay has launched a new global brand campaign called "eBay Stories" to highlight the unique narratives and passions behind purchases on its platform. Developed with JOAN, the campaign aims to rekindle the joy of shopping by showcasing how every item has a special story, rolling out across the UK, US, and Germany on various media. It builds on the "Things. People. Love." platform, emphasizing eBay's role as a home for passions and its evolution as an e-commerce leader.

title: US Bancorp DE Purchases 6,233 Shares of eBay Inc. $EBAY - MarketBeat
summary: US Bancorp DE increased its stake in eBay Inc. by 6.0% during the second quarter, acquiring an additional 6,233 shares to bring its total holdings to 110,987 shares valued at $8.26 million. eBay reported strong Q2 earnings with a 6.1% revenue increase and EPS beating analyst estimates, alongside declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in eBay, which currently has a market capitalization of $40.47 billion.

title: eBay (EBAY) Sees Price Target Raised by Baird to $100.00 | EBAY Stock News
summary: Baird has raised its price target for eBay (EBAY) to $100.00 from $89.00, maintaining an 'Outperform' rating. This adjustment reflects a 12.36% increase, and follows similar target raises or initiations from other firms like Wells Fargo, Mizuho, and B of A Securities. Despite the positive outlook from Baird, the average analyst target price for eBay is $88.48, and GuruFocus' estimated GF Value suggests a potential downside from its current price.

title: Robert W. Baird Issues Positive Forecast for eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) Stock Price - MarketBeat
summary: Robert W. Baird raised its target price for eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) stock from $89.00 to $100.00. This positive outlook is supported by several other analysts who have also increased their target prices and ratings for the e-commerce company. The article details eBay's recent stock performance, financial metrics, and quarterly earnings which exceeded analyst expectations.

title: eBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY) Given Consensus Rating of “Hold” by Analysts
summary: Analysts have issued a consensus "Hold" rating for eBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY), with several firms adjusting price targets. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share, and institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings. eBay operates marketplace platforms connecting buyers and sellers globally.

title: Verdence Capital Advisors LLC Increases Position in eBay Inc. $EBAY
summary: Verdence Capital Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in eBay Inc. by 71.2% in the second quarter, bringing its total holdings to 17,447 shares worth $1,299,000. Other institutional investors also boosted their positions in eBay, with 87.48% of the company's stock now owned by institutional investors and hedge funds. The article also details eBay's recent financial performance, stock metrics, dividend announcement, and analyst ratings, which currently lean towards a "Hold" consensus.

title: Online Marketplace Stocks Q2 Results: Benchmarking Sea (NYSE:SE)
summary: This article analyzes the Q2 earnings performance of Sea (NYSE:SE) and other online marketplace stocks. Sea reported strong revenue growth, exceeding analyst expectations, and demonstrated impressive beats in paying users and EBITDA. The broader online marketplace sector also performed well in Q2, with most stocks seeing significant share price increases post-earnings.

title: Analyst Ratings Update: Bernstein Raises Price Target for eBay (EBAY) | EBAY Stock News
summary: Bernstein analyst Nikhil Devnani maintained a "Market Perform" rating for eBay (EBAY) and raised the price target from $85 to $95, an 11.76% increase. This update reflects a positive outlook for the company's stock, though the average target from 28 analysts at $88.48 implies a slight downside from the current price. GuruFocus estimates the fair value for eBay Inc (EBAY) at $64.90, suggesting a more significant potential downside.

title: Bernstein raises eBay stock price target to $95 on trading cards strength - Investing.com Canada

title: ACV Auctions, eBay, Chewy, Expedia, and Chegg Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of ACV Auctions, eBay, Chewy, Expedia, and Chegg fell after investor fears over artificial intelligence disrupting the software industry triggered a broad sell-off. The anxiety stemmed from the rapid adoption of new 'agentic AI' tools, which some investors believed could dismantle traditional Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) business models, leading to indiscriminate selling. Expedia, in particular, saw its shares fall by 4.9% and is down 28.7% since the beginning of the year.

title: Demystifying eBay: Insights From 4 Analyst Reviews
summary: Over the last three months, four analysts have provided diverse ratings for eBay (NASDAQ: EBAY), with an average 12-month price target of $104.5, reflecting a 2.45% increase from the previous target. The article highlights eBay's financial performance, including an impressive revenue growth rate of 9.47% as of September 2025, high net margin, and strong ROE and ROA. Analyst ratings and target adjustments offer insights into the company's market standing and financial health, emphasizing the importance of understanding these evaluations alongside financial indicators.

title: eBay Inc (EBAY) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic Acquisitions Propel Performance
summary: eBay Inc. reported strong Q4 2025 financial results with significant increases in GMV and revenue, driven by strategic initiatives such as Focus Categories, C2C, and Recommerce. The company's performance was bolstered by the acquisition of Depop and the growth of eBay Live, along with the integration of AI technologies. Despite international GMV declines and integration costs from Depop, eBay anticipates continued growth into 2026.

title: EBay to Acquire Depop for $1.2 Billion
summary: EBay Inc. has agreed to acquire Depop, a fashion marketplace popular with Gen Z and Millennial consumers, for approximately $1.2 billion in cash. This acquisition aims to accelerate eBay's consumer-to-consumer strategy, particularly in secondhand fashion, and expand its reach to a younger audience. The deal is expected to close in Q2, with Depop retaining its brand and platform.

title: Infographic: How eBay (EBAY) performed in Q4 2025
summary: eBay reported revenue of $2.96 billion for Q4 2025, a 15% increase, and a net income of $528 million. The company's Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) rose to $21.2 billion, up 10%. For Q1 2026, eBay anticipates revenue between $3.00-3.05 billion and GMV of $21.5-21.9 billion, and also announced the acquisition of Depop, Inc. from Etsy for approximately $1.2 billion.

title: eBay buys Depop from Etsy for more than $1 billion - Bizwomen
summary: eBay has acquired Depop from Etsy for $1.2 billion in cash, aiming to boost its fashion sales and attract a younger demographic. Depop, an online secondhand clothing marketplace, generated nearly $1 billion in merchandise sales last year, with most users under 34. This acquisition aligns with eBay's strategy to expand its recommerce presence, capitalize on the growing circular fashion market, and leverage AI to enhance customer experience.

title: eBay (EBAY): Focus category momentum and a boost to fashion recommerce
summary: eBay (EBAY) saw its shares rise after reporting strong double-digit growth in sales and earnings for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company's focus categories, especially collectibles, and its expansion into fashion recommerce through the acquisition of Depop, were key drivers of this performance. For Q1 2026, eBay projects continued revenue and GMV growth, along with an increase in adjusted EPS.

title: EBay Execs Seek To Bar Criminal Deal From Harassment Trial
summary: Three former eBay executives, who are facing a harassment lawsuit from a Massachusetts couple, have requested that the judge prevent the plaintiffs from mentioning a deferred prosecution agreement involving eBay in a separate criminal case. The executives are slated to go to trial next month for allegedly targeting the couple over their blog posts.

title: Elton John Partners With eBay to Release a Personal Collection of Pre-loved Fashion in Support of Elton John AIDS Foundation
summary: Elton John is partnering with eBay for "Rocket Man Resale," an auction of hundreds of items from his personal wardrobe, including designer clothing and concert memorabilia. One hundred percent of the sales will benefit the Elton John AIDS Foundation. The auction, starting June 27, 2024, aims to raise funds and awareness while promoting the circular economy and supporting the foundation's mission to end AIDS stigma.

title: Destroyed Mementos, Found Again on eBay
summary: The Fuller family experienced a harrowing ordeal when their possessions, including cherished mementos, were stolen and then intentionally destroyed in a fire while moving to a new state. Through a GoFundMe, a registry, and the unique ability to find lost items like a Mickey Mouse jack-o'-lantern, vintage toys, and a specific perfume on eBay, they were able to replace many meaningful objects. This transformative experience gave the family a new appreciation for eBay sellers and helped them realize the sentimental value of certain possessions.

title: Triodos Investment Management BV Has $56.17 Million Stock Holdings in eBay Inc. $EBAY
summary: Triodos Investment Management BV recently reduced its stake in eBay Inc. by 7% in Q3, now holding 617,698 shares valued at $56.17 million. Despite this reduction and continued insider selling, eBay reported stronger-than-expected Q4 revenue and EPS, issued optimistic Q1 2026 guidance, and boosted its dividend and share buybacks. The company's acquisition of Depop for $1.2 billion is expected to enhance its recommerce presence but may cause short-term margin and EPS dilution.

title: EBay Hires JetBlue CFO to Lead Its Finances
summary: eBay Inc. has appointed Steve Priest, currently CFO of JetBlue Airways Corp., as its new chief financial officer, ending a search that lasted over a year. Priest will assume the role on June 21, succeeding interim CFO Andy Cring. This move aims to bring new financial leadership to the e-commerce platform.

title: Breaking Cards and Building Community on eBay Live
summary: James Morehead, an eBay Live seller, has successfully transitioned from a career in construction to full-time sports card breaking, building a loyal community around his passion. He streams six hours a night, six days a week, fostering real-time connection and an entertaining experience for collectors. Morehead emphasizes humor, information, and positivity in his streams, which has allowed him to expand his business, bring on family and customers to his team, and maintain flexibility to coach youth sports.

title: LKQ Corp. price target range raised to $45-$50 at Barrington
summary: Barrington has increased its price target range for LKQ Corp. (LKQ) to $45-$50 from $40-$45, maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares based on a sum-of-the-parts valuation. Despite the raised price target, the firm is lowering its adjusted EPS estimates for 2026 and 2027 to $2.95 and $3.20, respectively, from previous forecasts of $3.05 and $3.28 due to updated guidance ranges. This news follows other recent analyst adjustments for LKQ, highlighting varying perspectives on the company's financial outlook.

title: Etsy Momentum Drops Following Mixed Q4, Despite Fashion Marketplace Depop Sale To eBay
summary: Etsy (ETSY) has seen its momentum ranking drop to the 19.26th percentile following mixed Q4 results and the sale of its fashion marketplace, Depop, to eBay. The company reported negative price trends across short, medium, and long-term horizons, indicating broad technical weakness. Despite exceeding EPS estimates, revenue slightly missed consensus, leading analysts to remain cautious about Etsy's core marketplace growth, even as the company pivots to "human connection" and AI-driven discovery, and plans share buybacks.

title: eBay Unveils Pokémon Day Auction Celebrating 30 Years of Iconic Collectibles
summary: eBay is celebrating 30 years of Pokémon with "The 30/30 Collection," an exclusive online auction featuring 30 iconic Pokémon collectibles. Kicking off on Pokémon Day (February 27th), bidding for each item will start at its original retail price. The event will also include an in-person celebration in New York City with live programming, grading, and trading opportunities.

title: A settlement is reached in a case tied to eBay's bizarre deliveries and harassment campaign
summary: A Massachusetts couple, David and Ina Steiner, who were terrorized by former eBay Inc. employees through bizarre deliveries and cyberstalking, have reached a settlement in their lawsuit against the company. The settlement terms were not disclosed, but the case was dismissed after the agreement. This follows a previous criminal penalty paid by eBay Inc. and the conviction of former employees involved in the harassment campaign.

title: A settlement is reached in a case tied to eBay's bizarre deliveries and harassment campaign
summary: A Massachusetts couple, David and Ina Steiner, who were subjected to a harassment campaign by former eBay employees, have reached a settlement in their lawsuit against the company. The couple, who run an online newsletter, had filed a 2021 lawsuit alleging conspiracy to intimidate and silence them through threats and bizarre deliveries. The terms of the settlement were not disclosed, and the case has been dismissed by a Boston U.S. District Judge.

title: eBay cuts 800 jobs after spending $1.2B to acquire fashion resale platform
summary: eBay announced it will cut 800 jobs, or approximately 6% of its full-time workforce, as part of an effort to streamline operations. The e-commerce giant plans to reinvest in growth areas, particularly targeting younger shoppers through secondhand fashion. This move follows eBay's previous acquisition of a fashion resale platform for $1.2 billion.

title: EBay Is Laying Off About 800 Workers
summary: EBay is cutting approximately 800 jobs, or 6 percent of its global workforce, to align its operations with strategic priorities. This marks the third round of layoffs in three years and follows its recent acquisition of Depop for $1.2 billion, aimed at attracting younger shoppers. Despite strong quarterly results, the company states these reductions are necessary for reinvestment and structural alignment.

title: eBay Inc (San Jose) WARN Act Investigation
summary: Strauss Borrelli PLLC is investigating eBay, Inc. for a potential violation of the WARN Act following a mass layoff of 243 employees in San Jose, California, announced on February 25, 2026. The law firm believes affected employees may be entitled to 60 days of severance pay and benefits if eBay failed to provide the required 60-day notice. The WARN Act mandates that employers with 100 or more employees give 60 days' notice for significant layoffs or plant closings.

title: Bank of America Maintains Buy on eBay Inc. (EBAY) Feb 26, 2026
summary: Bank of America Securities maintained a Buy rating on eBay Inc. (EBAY) on February 26, 2026, citing the company's focus on growth but without issuing a new price target. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, the stock experienced a -2.78% dip after the announcement. This maintained rating is seen as a confirmation of eBay's growth strategy for investors, rather than a short-term catalyst, with artificial intelligence tools like Meyka AI rating EBAY with a B+ grade based on various financial metrics and comparisons.

title: eBay Inc. (EBAY): A Bull Case Theory
summary: This article summarizes a bull thesis on eBay Inc. (EBAY) from TickerTrends Research, anticipating a stronger quarter due to re-accelerating platform usage and momentum in its collectibles ecosystem. The thesis highlights increased consumer engagement and high-profile collectible listings, suggesting potential revenue upside and a positive re-rating of the stock despite previous bearish sentiment. The article notes that eBay's stock has appreciated significantly since a past bearish assessment.

title: eBay Cuts 800 Jobs as it Reshapes Workforce Around Strategic Priorities
summary: eBay Inc. announced plans to cut 800 jobs, or 6% of its full-time workforce, as part of an effort to align staffing levels with strategic priorities, while still planning to hire in critical areas. This marks the third round of layoffs in three years and follows an acquisition and strong quarterly report. The company aims to reinvest in its business and restructure for future growth.
